system.description:
The Road to Hrafnborg

Level: 1 | Beat: 2
Location: The Lantern Road
Type: Travel montage (Easy, 2â€“3 days)
Tone: Cold fellowship, growing dread, first blood

The PCs travel to Hrafnborg along the failing Lantern Road. Strangers bound by the same grim duty share a road, a fire, and their suspicions. This montage covers the journey before the party reaches the graveyard outside Hrafnborg â€” where the dead will rise for the first time.

complications.round1:
Navigate the Lantern Road (Reason)

Stay on failing roads, read buried markers, avoid dead-end detours. The road splits and rejoins â€” choosing the wrong fork adds hours.

Endure the Cold (Might)

Resist frostbite, carry gear through snowdrifts, ford frozen streams. The supplies must last days, not hours.

Find Shelter at Night (Intuition)

Locate wind-breaks, abandoned crofts, or natural shelters before the temperature drops to lethal ranges.

Avoid Trouble on the Road (Agility)

Slip past bandit camps, desperate refugees, or rival groups who suspect why you're heading toward Hrafnborg while everyone else flees.

outcomes.round1:
Total Success

Arrive rested and supplied. No Heat loss. Earn 1 Victory.

Partial Success

Arrive tired. Lose 1 day's rations (Heat) or one piece of minor equipment is damaged (Weight).

Total Failure

Arrive exhausted and rattled. One PC has a condition (frostbitten or exhausted). Lose 2 days' rations. Director gains 2 additional Malice for the graveyard encounter.
